attributes.action: SS in NI and the whole of UK should be investigated for malpractice & misconduct
attributes.additional_details:
They needs to start providing proof and what they accuse parents of, they need to get drug tested, they need to start getting regulated, they need to become more human and actually help the parents instead of trying to proof how unable the parents are.
They have been taking kids and breaking up families for years and nothing is being done about it. They whole government turned a blind eye to a system thats not useful to the citizens of the country instead to the government. Enough is enough
attributes.background: The government and parliament should investigate the trust and social welfare service in regards to kids being taken from parents without a good reason and also not following the correct procedure, kids have been taken from well abled parents, documents altered and patents manipulated.

rejection.details:
Review accountability for incorrect decisions regarding the removal of a child
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/737148
